title.rendered: [Free Webinar] Mastering Fundraising Metrics: Achieving Your Nonprofit’s Revenue Goals

content.rendered:
Date: Tuesday, July 30, 2024
Time: 1 pm ET / 10 am PT (1 hour)
Cost: Free
Presented by:
• Meena Das, CEO at NamasteData.org and Data Is For Everyone
• Maggie Dubyk, VP of Strategy & Operations at Keela

Are you tired of grappling with fundraising metrics that seem disconnected from your nonprofit’s goals? Join this free one-hour webinar to revolutionize your approach to fundraising metrics! Discover how to design, implement, and manage metrics that are not only meaningful but also practical in enhancing your fundraising strategies and hitting your organization’s revenue goals.

In this session, we dive deep into the art of crafting fundraising metrics that matter. Shift from messy metrics tracking to focused, purposeful data tailored to your organization’s objectives. Through real-world examples and hands-on exercises, you’ll learn how to:

  • Identify Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) aligned with your nonprofit’s mission.
  • Implement straightforward tracking tools to monitor progress effectively.
  • Refine metrics to drive tangible improvements in your fundraising strategies and ensure you’re on track to meet your revenue goals.

No more guesswork or vague insights. Gain the skills you need to build metrics that provide clear guidance and drive impactful decision-making. Whether you’re a seasoned fundraiser or just starting out, this webinar equips you with the tools to build and refine fundraising metrics that truly make a difference.

Don’t miss this opportunity to transform your fundraising strategy. Register now and take the first step toward unlocking the power of meaningful metrics for your nonprofit!

 Register Now!

Please Note: This webinar will be recorded. If you can not attend the webinar live, please register and you will be sent a link to the recording 24-48 hours after the webinar is over. Also, visit GoToWebinar’s Attendee System Check for information about how to join and attend this webinar.
